name: @pryzm/spatial-index
description: PRYZM 3 — Spatial index. Wave 8 stub creation; Wave 11 migration will move ElementSpatialIndex (src/core/drawing/ElementSpatialIndex.ts) and SpatialGrid (packages/picking/src/snapping/SpatialGrid.ts) into this package. Provides the ISpatialIndex<T> contract consumed by the snap engine and the element picking layer. Sprint AC: Room spatial services (RoomGraphService, RoomQueryService, RoomValidationService, RoomTypeInferenceEngine) promoted from src/engine/subsystems/spatial/. Per 15-PACKAGE-POPULATION-GAP.md §0.0.5 row src/spatial.

pryzm.migrationNote: Wave 11: move SpatialGrid and ElementSpatialIndex here; packages/picking/snapping imports ISpatialIndex from @pryzm/spatial-index instead of defining it inline. Sprint AC: room spatial services promoted; see 47-EXTRACTION-SUBPHASES-5.1-5.2.md §8.
